name: DraftPilot
tagline: AI-powered writing assistant for blogs, ads, emails, and social posts. Generate, rewrite, and optimize content at scale. Free, no word limits.
metaDescription: DraftPilot is a free AI writing tool that replaces Jasper. Generate blog posts, ad copy, emails, and social content with AI. No word limits, no subscriptions.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">✍️</text></svg>

features.title: Long-Form Content
features.desc: Generate full blog posts, articles, and reports with structured outlines. AI writes section by section while maintaining narrative coherence and your brand voice.

features.title: Ad Copy Generator
features.desc: Create high-converting ad copy for Google, Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn in seconds. A/B test variations and optimize for click-through rates.

features.title: Email Campaigns
features.desc: Draft email sequences, newsletters, and cold outreach templates. AI adapts tone from formal business to casual brand voice based on your audience.

features.title: Social Media Posts
features.desc: Generate platform-specific content for Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok. Auto-adapts character limits, hashtags, and formatting per platform.

features.title: SEO Content Scoring
features.desc: Real-time SEO analysis as you write. Get keyword density recommendations, readability scores, and competitor content gap analysis built into the editor.

features.title: Brand Voice Training
features.desc: Upload existing content to train the AI on your brand voice, tone, and terminology. Every output matches your style guide automatically.

includes: Ad copy for all major platforms
